title: Robbie in Parliament | Robbie Moore MP
meta_description: As your local MP, Robbie Moore is in Parliament every week it sits, standing up for Keighley and Ilkley and fighting for more investment for our community. Below, you can see Robbie's speeches, as printed in Hansard.

Below, you can see Robbie's speeches, as printed in Hansard. Special Educational Needs Support | Women and Equalities | Commons debates What steps the Government are taking to support children with SEND at school.
